form.formComment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a scorching early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 5.5 lengths third (25.70) over 450m at this track. Recorded one of the quickest times on the card last time despite being beaten. Follow up.

form.formComment: Good starter. Latest effort finished last on April 14 over 450m at this track behind Striped Mac beaten 4.5 lengths (25.72) in a Grade 5. Has run blistering time here with a 25.21 PB at the distance. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Comes off a (25.41) win last time, scoring by one length in a Grade 5 over 450m at this track. Has one success and three minors from eight starts from box 4. Can feature with the right run.
